name: @pm/snapshot-capture
description: The one-time capture of the real crate (ADR-0002 §1/§5/§6, issue #9): a checkpointed, resumable CLI that pulls ~500 releases from api.discogs.com (label searches → deterministic curation → per-release details with the price aggregate inline → image downloads), respects the X-Discogs-Ratelimit-* headers with backoff, normalizes ONCE into the two trays, Zod-validates via @pm/data-contract, and freezes the result under crate/ in the fixture snapshot layout with a dated SnapshotManifest. Every fetched page/release/image lands on disk before the next request; a re-run resumes, never re-pulls. Dev-only — never shipped; the serve path stays credential-free. Deliberately has no `test` script (@pm/origin-suite precedent): the frozen output is proven by Zod validation at capture time and by serving it through the composed origin.
